title: clasp.json Config
description: Configuration file for google/clasp — Command Line Apps Script Projects

$schema.description: Path to this JSON schema for IDE autocomplete

scriptId.description: Google Apps Script project ID. Found in the editor URL: https://script.google.com/home/projects/{scriptId}/edit

rootDir.description: Root directory where local .js/.ts files live. Default: '.'

fileExtension.description: File extension used locally. clasp pushes as .gs

filePushOrder.description: Explicit push order for files with load-order dependencies

projectId.description: GCP project ID linked for advanced APIs

scriptExtensions.description: Additional script file extensions recognized by clasp

htmlExtensions.description: HTML file extensions recognized by clasp

fileDenyList.description: Glob patterns of files to ignore during push

skipSubdirectories.description: If true, clasp will not push files from subdirectories
